---
title: "nsf_baseline"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
if (!require('rstudioapi')) BiocManager::install("rstudioapi");library(rstudioapi)

# change working directory to folder with script
setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)) 

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(data.table)
library(magrittr)

options(scipen=999)
```

```{r clean-grants}
nsf_grants <- read.csv("nsf_data/nsf_grants.csv")

#directorates to include
dir_incl <- c("BIO", "CSE", "EDU", "ENG", "GEO", "MPS", "SBE", "TIP")

# divisions within office of director to include
div_incl <- c("OIA", "OISE")

# helper column to put listed account categories together (O/D divisions are split out)
nsf_grants %<>% mutate(account_name = ifelse(dir_abbr == "O/D", div_abbr, dir_abbr)) %>%
  filter(account_name %in% c(dir_incl, div_incl))
```


```{r budget-cuts}
# https://www.usinflationcalculator.com/ 2020-2027 dollars inflation adjusted to 2026 using: https://www.usinflationcalculator.com/ and assumption of 2% inflation from 2026 to 2027 
inf_adj <- c(1.26, 1.21, 1.12, 1.07, 1.04, 1.02, 1, .98)
inf_by_year <- tibble(inf = inf_adj, fund_oblg_fiscal_yr = c(2020:2027))

# calculate losses for each grant
nsf_grants %<>% 
  left_join(inf_by_year) %>%
  filter(!is.na(inf)) %>%
  mutate(adj_fund = inf * fund_oblg_amt) %>%
  filter(fund_oblg_fiscal_yr %in% 2020:2024)

```

```{r}
geo_dict <- read.csv("nsf_data/NSF_addresses_US_tract_county_cong119.csv") %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(CountyFIPS_str, 5, pad = "0"),
         GEOID = str_pad(CongFIPS, 4, pad="0"),
         tractid = str_pad(TractFIPS_Str, 11, pad="0"),
         inst_street_address = inst_stree) %>%
  filter(! StateName %in% c("American Samoa", "Guam", "Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands", "Puerto Rico")) %>%
  select(tractid, inst_street_address, inst_name) %>%
  distinct()

nsf_grants %<>% left_join(geo_dict) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tractid)) %>%
  group_by(tractid, account_name, fund_oblg_fiscal_yr) %>%
  summarise(raw_funding = sum(adj_fund, na.rm=TRUE))

# dictionary to map fips codes to state names
NSF_state_dict <- read.csv("data/state_and_county_fips_master.csv") %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(FIPS, 5, pad = "0")) %>%
  filter(!endsWith(FIPS, "000")) 

# append state FIPS codes
NSF_state_dict <- tibble(
  state_name = c(state.name, "District of Columbia"),
  state = c(state.abb, "DC")) %>%
  right_join(NSF_state_dict) %>%
  mutate(state_FIPS = str_sub(FIPS, 1, 2)) %>%
  arrange(state) 
```

```{r Commuter Weighting}
county_commute <- read.csv("data/county_commute_NIH.csv") %>%
  select(DESTINATION, DESTINATION_total_workers, Commuters, ORIGIN, proportion) %>% 
  mutate(DESTINATION = str_pad(DESTINATION, 11, pad = "0"),
         ORIGIN = str_pad(ORIGIN, 5, pad = "0"))

cong_commute <- fread("https://osf.io/m5kb6/download") %>%
  mutate(Cong_DESTINATION = str_pad(w_tract, 11, pad = "0"),
         Cong_ORIGIN = str_pad(h_cd119, 4, pad = "0")) %>%
  rename(commuters = commutes) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Cong_ORIGIN))

cong_info <- read.csv("./data/us_representatives_119th_congress.csv") %>%
  mutate(GEOID = str_pad(GEOID, 4, pad = "0")) %>%
  select(GEOID, STATE_NAME, NAME, PARTY) %>%
  rename(state = STATE_NAME,
         pol_party = PARTY,
         rep_name = NAME)

# get total workers per cong district
cong_commute_sum <- cong_commute %>%
  group_by(Cong_DESTINATION) %>%
  summarise(total_workers = sum(commuters, na.rm=TRUE))

# merge in total workers
cong_commute <- left_join(cong_commute, cong_commute_sum) %>%
  select(Cong_DESTINATION, Cong_ORIGIN, commuters, total_workers) %>%
  rename(DESTINATION = Cong_DESTINATION,
         ORIGIN = Cong_ORIGIN)

# calculate proportion of workers who work in district X who live in district Y
cong_commute$proportion <- cong_commute$commuters / cong_commute$total_workers
```

```{r}
#summarize NIH data by FIPS code
NSF_grants_tract <- expand.grid(tractid = unique(nsf_grants$tractid),
                                     account_name = unique(nsf_grants$account_name),
                                     fund_oblg_fiscal_yr = unique(nsf_grants$fund_oblg_fiscal_yr)) %>%
  left_join(nsf_grants) %>%
  group_by(tractid, account_name) %>%
  summarise(raw_funding = mean(raw_funding, na.rm=TRUE))

fips_names <- read.csv("data/state_and_county_fips_master.csv") %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(FIPS, 5, pad ="0")) %>%
  select(FIPS, name)

states <- read.csv("data/states.csv") %>%
  mutate(state_FIPS = str_pad(FIPS, 2, pad = "0"))

#combine commuter data with NSF data
county_commute_NSF <- merge(county_commute, NSF_grants_tract, by.x = "DESTINATION", by.y = "tractid", all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(account_name)) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(replace(., is.na(.), 0))) %>%
  mutate(raw_funding = raw_funding * proportion) %>%
  rename(FIPS = ORIGIN) %>%
  group_by(FIPS, account_name) %>%
  summarize(raw_funding = sum(raw_funding, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(replace(., is.na(.), 0))) %>%
  mutate(state_FIPS = str_sub(FIPS, 1, 2)) %>%
  left_join(fips_names) %>%
  left_join(states %>% select(-FIPS)) %>%
  mutate(econ_impact = raw_funding * 2.25) %>%
  select(FIPS, name, state, account_name, raw_funding, econ_impact) %>%
  filter(FIPS != "00000")

write_csv(county_commute_NSF, "output/baseline_county_nsf.csv")

msa <- read.csv("data/cbsa2fipsxw_2023.csv") %>%
  select(CountyFIPS, CBSA_NAME, CBSA_FIPS) %>%
  rename(FIPS = CountyFIPS) %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(FIPS, 5, pad ="0"),
         CBSA_FIPS = str_pad(CBSA_FIPS, 5, pad ="0"))

# city level
county_commute_NSF %>%
  left_join(msa) %>%
  left_join(fips_names) %>%
  mutate(CBSA_FIPS = ifelse(is.na(CBSA_FIPS), FIPS, CBSA_FIPS)) %>%
  mutate(CBSA_NAME = ifelse(is.na(CBSA_NAME), name, CBSA_NAME)) %>%
  group_by(CBSA_FIPS, CBSA_NAME, account_name) %>%
  summarise(across(c(raw_funding, econ_impact), ~ sum(.x))) %>%
  write_csv("output/baseline_city_nsf.csv")

library(usmap)
plot_usmap(
  data = county_commute_NSF %>% 
  group_by(FIPS) %>%
  summarise(raw_funding = sum(raw_funding)) %>% rename(fips = FIPS),
  values = "raw_funding",
  regions = "counties",
  color = "white",
  linewidth = 0.0
) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10",
                       labels = label_dollar(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(fill = "Baseline funding")
```

```{r}
cong_commute_NSF <- merge(cong_commute, NSF_grants_tract, by.x = "DESTINATION", by.y = "tractid", all.x = TRUE, allow.cartesian=TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(account_name)) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(replace(., is.na(.), 0))) %>%
  mutate(raw_funding = raw_funding * proportion) %>%
  rename(GEOID = ORIGIN) %>%
  group_by(GEOID, account_name) %>%
  summarize(raw_funding = sum(raw_funding, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate_all(funs(replace(., is.na(.), 0)))  %>%
  mutate(state_FIPS = str_sub(GEOID, 1, 2)) %>%
  left_join(states) %>%
  mutate(econ_impact = raw_funding * 2.25) %>%
  select(GEOID, state, account_name, raw_funding, econ_impact)

write_csv(cong_commute_NSF, "output/baseline_district_nsf.csv")

cong_commute_NSF %>%
  group_by(state, account_name) %>%
  summarize(across(c(raw_funding, econ_impact), ~ sum(.x))) %>%
  write_csv("output/baseline_state_nsf.csv")

plot_usmap(
  data = cong_commute_NSF %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarize(across(c(raw_funding, econ_impact), ~ sum(.x))),
  values = "raw_funding",
  regions = "states",
  color = "white",
  linewidth = 0.0
) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10",
                       labels = label_dollar(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(fill = "Baseline funding")
```
